ogTitle: Illowa vs Indented Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Illowa and Indented Head.
heading: Illowa vs Indented Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Illowa, Victoria and Indented Head, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Illowa has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Indented Head (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Illowa or Indented Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Illowa has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Indented Head scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Illowa scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Indented Head scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Illowa or Indented Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Illowa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
